Stage 1.description: {{sl.actors.0}} lays on side, looking over shoulder at {{sl.actors.1}}. {{sl.actors.1}} is raised on one arm, the other arm hugs {{sl.actors.0}}, and looks into {{sl.actors.0}}'s eyes.

Stage 2.description: {{sl.actors.0}} lays on side with eyes closed, head turned towards {{sl.actors.1}}. {{sl.actors.1}} is raised on one arm, the other arm hugs {{sl.actors.0}}, and kisses {{sl.actors.0}}'s.

Stage 3.description: {{sl.actors.0}} lays on side with eyes closed and head resting on {{sl.actors.1}}'s arm. {{sl.actors.1}} is raised on one arm, the other arm hugs {{sl.actors.0}}, and head resting on {{sl.actors.0}}'s shoulder.
